description.zh-Hans: 使用三种插值模式之一混合两个输入帧：交叉淡入淡出（线性插值）、随机像素溶解或水平滑动。输出混合结果作为「图像」，混合权重作为「遮罩」。
description.en: Blends two input frames using one of three interpolation modes: cross-fade (lerp), random pixel dissolve, or horizontal slide. Outputs the blended result as "image" and the blend weight as "mask".

triggers.zh-Hans: 帧插值, 交叉淡入淡出, 溶解, 滑动, 帧混合
triggers.en: frame interpolation, cross fade, dissolve, slide, frame blend

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 在两个动画帧之间创建交叉淡入淡出过渡效果。
exampleUsage.en: Create a cross-fade transition between two animation frames.
